title: wedelia linearifolia
intro: Wedelia linearifolia, also known as Narrow-leaf Wedelia or Wedelia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Wedelia linearifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
